'''Kuat Freight Port''' was one of two enormous [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] that controlled traffic flow into the [[Kuat system/Legends|Kuat system]]. While the [[Kuat Passenger Port]] handled incoming travellers and visitors, the Kuat Freighter Port was responsible for incoming cargo and freight.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|9|Slaying Dragons|reprint=1}}
